name: Breadcrumb
description: A navigation trail of links to parent pages of the current page in hierarchical order, helping users understand their location within a website.

roles.description: The breadcrumb trail is contained within a navigation landmark

required_attributes.description: Set to 'page' to identify the current page link

notes: Use an ordered list (<ol>) inside <nav> for proper structure
Visual separators between links should be added via CSS, not DOM content
The current page may be rendered as plain text instead of a link
